title: ToolPack
description: A Merge Agent Handler Tool Pack groups connectors and their exposed tools into a named bundle that AI agents can authenticate against and execute.

slug.description: Stable identifier used in MCP/search URLs.

items.description: Connector slug attached to the pack.

tool_count.description: Number of exposed tools across all attached connectors.

default_for_new_users.description: Whether new Registered Users automatically receive this pack.

items.description: References to standard-entity-rules or custom-regex-rules applied to the pack.
